name: ai-expense-analysis
description: AI-powered expense analysis with receipt extraction, depreciation calculation (AfA), and tax deductibility analysis using LLM providers
author: OpenTYME Team

enabled.label: Enable AI Analysis
enabled.description: Master switch for all AI analysis features

ai_enabled.label: Enable AI Provider
ai_enabled.description: Enable connection to AI provider for analysis

ai_provider.label: AI Provider
ai_provider.description: AI service provider (local, openai, azure, anthropic)

ai_api_url.label: AI API URL
ai_api_url.description: Base URL for the AI API (e.g., http://localhost:1234/v1 for LM Studio)

ai_api_key.label: AI API Key
ai_api_key.description: API key for the AI provider (if required)

ai_model.label: AI Model
ai_model.description: Model name to use (e.g., qwen/qwen3-v1-30b, gpt-4)

mcp_server_url.label: MCP Server URL
mcp_server_url.description: URL of the MCP server for PDF text extraction

mcp_server_api_key.label: MCP Server API Key
mcp_server_api_key.description: API key for MCP server (if required)

min_confidence_threshold.label: Minimum Confidence Threshold
min_confidence_threshold.description: Minimum confidence score (0.0-1.0) to accept AI suggestions
